meta.title: The True Price: How Pyth Is Rebuilding the $50B Industry You've Never Heard Of

transcript: All right everyone, I'm Mike Cahill. I am the CEO of Douro Labs and we're building the Pyth Network, which is revolutionizing a 50 billion dollar industry. So let's start off, I'm gonna ask you just a quick question. Who recognizes these companies? You got Bloomberg, LSEG, and FactSet. Now most of you probably do, but most people outside of finance don't. But what if I told you that collectively they're worth over 180 billion dollars? And they're not AI companies. So what do they sell? Financial market data. Now here's another question. How much do you think companies have spent on financial market data in 2024? Think about it. Now I'll give you a hint. If you had invested in financial market data 25 years ago, you actually would have outperformed gold by 2x, the S&P 500 by seven-fold, and oil by 18-fold. Yeah, financial market data generates over 50 billion dollars a year. 50 billion dollars every single year. And the cost of market data has increased over 15-fold over the last 25 years. So you might be wondering, why? Isn't the price of Bitcoin, Nvidia, or gold just public information? Well, the answer is simple. Data quality. High quality market data is extremely valuable because low quality market data leads to people getting ripped off. So how do you know that you're getting the best price for something? How do you know you're getting the best price for... I don't know... a cauliflower? A cauliflower is a cauliflower is a cauliflower is a cauliflower is a cauliflower. Am I right? Thought so. Why is one cauliflower more expensive than another? It's a cauliflower. $2, $3, $4. More?! 25% off. But you only get half? What the ****?! Give it a famous advert. Look at your cauliflower. Now back to me. Package it how you like! It's still a cauliflower. This one's stanky but the price tag's lanky. Who even makes these prices anyway? What if everyone had access to the best price without paying cauliflower HQ? Waiting for him. Letting her get first bite. Or whatever that is. Well, we're not laughing. Pyth captures the true price of everything and delivers it across the finance industry in real time. So no one gets ripped off. All right. And special thanks to our very creative marketing team. And if you haven't already, you can go bid on cauliflowers and understand how the Pyth algorithm works a little bit here at the event. Well look, data quality is worth a premium, but historically it's been incredibly expensive and fragmented. Pyth has changed things by being the highest quality data at the lowest possible costs. How? Well we created a new economic model for market data using a blockchain innovation. So this is what things used to look like before. Market data from a definition of first principles is the price that people want to buy things at or the price that things have just traded at. So you start with institutions. You've got the trading firms, you've got banks. Now they're the ones that are generally trading things. And they all trade in an asset class or a geography at different exchanges. So let's add those in as a next layer. Oof. Okay, so you've got different exchanges are confined to a certain geography and so there's a whole lot of them. Well if you want to get market data from this, it's going to be pretty tricky. So that's where we've got the data distributors that come in. These are the Bloombergs, LSEGs, FactSets. Now it looks a little bit like the cable companies in the late 90s, right? They have a bundle and then if you want to buy some premium sets through there, you buy them. But still as an institution, you actually have to aggregate this all together. So this is what it looks like now. Ah. Much cleaner. Two big things you're going to see here. So the first one is one stream coming into institutions. They don't have to aggregate it together. It's been aggregated on the blockchain in the price layer directly. The other thing is we've expanded the sources from just the exchanges to now trading firms as well. Expanding sources adds competition, allows us to do this at a much cheaper level. The combination of quality and quantity and cost has never been possible before. So we went from this where things were relatively low quality in a singular asset confined to very what they knew at a very high cost to this. And just two months ago, we launched Pyth Pro. It's the ultimate market data subscription built for and by institutions. It's like Spotify, but for market data. There's one subscription, one fee, every asset class, updated every millisecond, built by the best traders in the world. And the best part of it is it's 10x less expensive than anything else on the market. We start at zero dollars for people building crypto apps all the way up to ten thousand dollars per month for large enterprises. And since Pyth Pro's launch, we have already seen 10 institutional weekly inbounds, institutions looking for new market data, over 80 active subscribers, and we passed a million dollars ARR within the first month. Some of you might know that less than 5% of SaaS companies actually hit this within their first year. But this is actually just the beginning. If Pyth can just capture 1% of this 50 billion dollar a year business, this is a 500 million dollar annual revenue. And we've talked about this before, but now where is that revenue going to go? That's a great question. Introducing the Pyth Reserve. It's a tokenomics update designed for systematic value accrual. So how does it work? Number one, subscription revenue goes into the Pyth DAO. Number two, the Pyth DAO buys tokens on the open market. And number three, the purchased tokens sit into the Pyth Reserve. Three step process. All revenue either from subscription or any of the other revenue that goes into the Pyth DAO such as Entropy or on-chain fees or listing fees all flows into the DAO, accumulating Pyth token reserves. This is actually live now today. The vote went through earlier this week. More product adoption now means more network value. Institutions are lining up to pay for this data and now that value flows back into the ecosystem. So what are you waiting for? Go check it out. Thanks everyone.

# New Pyth Data Provider: Binance Oracle
Binance Oracle partners with Pyth to deliver reliable crypto price data directly to the BNB chain, expanding market coverage for BEP tokens.
Binance Oracle partners with Pyth to deliver reliable crypto price data directly to the BNB chain, expanding market coverage for BEP tokens.
Data Providers
Data Providers
Nov 1, 2022
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Ud94DIS8RAWnA62PtqSraL3OvEU.webp?width=1400&height=788)
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Ud94DIS8RAWnA62PtqSraL3OvEU.webp?width=1400&height=788)
We are thrilled to announce that[Binance Oracle](https://oracle.binance.com/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io)will contribute price data directly to Pyth. Binance Oracle is an official data service provided by Binance to provide reliable, secure, and timely on-chain data feeds to the projects on the BNB chain. This collaboration will greatly bolster Pyth market coverage from the major crypto assets to most of the BEP tokens.
## What is Binance Oracle?
* Binance Oracle is an important piece of infrastructure to boost the growth of DeFi. It is a data feed provided by Binance aimed at providing reliable, secure, and timely on-chain data to decentralized applications. This trustworthy data helps build a better ecosystem and lay a foundation for more exciting projects, starting from the BNB chain.
* [Binance](https://www.binance.com/en-GB?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io)is the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem and cryptocurrency infrastructure provider with a financial product suite that includes the largest digital asset exchange by volume.
* Trusted by millions worldwide, the Binance platform is dedicated to increasing the freedom of money for users and features an unmatched portfolio of crypto products and offerings, including trading and finance, education, data and research, social good, investment and incubation, decentralization and infrastructure solutions, and more.
**“**We built Binance Oracle with the goal to support the growth of the blockchain ecosystem by laying a foundation for supporting more exciting dApp projects," said Jack Chan, Engineering Lead of Binance Oracle. "We are glad that Pyth shares the same mission with us and we look forward to the collaboration. We believe this partnership can help us to deliver reliable, secure, and timely on-chain data feeds to more consumers, benefiting the developer community.”
“Binance is the world’s leading exchange for crypto assets, and their commitment to the blockchain community is exemplified with the launch of Binance Oracle," said Mike Cahill, Director of the Pyth Data Association. "The high-quality data provided by Binance Oracle will only make Pyth more robust and support our mission of bringing all data to all users on all chains.”
We look forward to further joining forces with more amazing partners to build the digital data marketplace we all need — a marketplace for institutional-grade, high-fidelity financial data made accessible for any application on any blockchain.
### Discover More
* Apply to become a[data provider](https://pyth-network.typeform.com/PythDPA?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io)
* Learn more about[Binance Oracle](https://oracle.binance.com/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io)
* Learn more about[Binance](https://www.binance.com/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io)
* Learn more about[Pyth Network](https://pyth.network/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io)
We can’t wait to hear what you think! You can join the Pyth[Discord](https://discord.gg/invite/PythNetwork?ref=p

# Community-Changing Developments \| Newsletter \#56

Pyth Network delivers bi-weekly DeFi updates. Pyth secures Gauntlet’s lending vaults on Ethereum & Base, boosting DeFi infrastructure.

Pyth Network delivers bi-weekly DeFi updates. Pyth secures Gauntlet’s lending vaults on Ethereum & Base, boosting DeFi infrastructure.

Newsletter

Newsletter

Jun 28, 2024

Welcome to the Pythiad, the official newsletter of the Pyth Network. Another week, another series of developments. Biweekly updates on all things DeFi await you below. Let’s get started.

## What’s New with Pyth

- [**Gauntlet**](https://x.com/gauntlet_xyz?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io) has selected Pyth to power and secure their lending vaults on Ethereum and Base with [**Morpho Labs**](https://x.com/MorphoLabs?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io). This partnership recognizes Pyth’s critical role in providing DeFi protocols a competitive edge through reliable infrastructure that fosters confidence and growth.

- Make sure you’re part of the discussion in the [Pyth Forum](https://forum.pyth.network/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io). Currently, there are community proposals for the design of a **Community Integrity Pool** for _**staking**_, _**slashing**_, and _**yield**_, as well as a proposal for the creation of a **Pyth Community Council**.

- The **Pyth pull oracle** is now available on **Solana**, delivering unmatched benefits to builders including increased reliability, higher frequencies, more feeds, historical data, and increased security.


## What’s New with DeFi

### Regulations

- [Coinbase accuses the US SEC and FDIC of improperly blocking document requests](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2024/06/27/coinbase-accuses-us-sec-fdic-of-improperly-blocking-document-requests/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).

- [Nigeria’s SEC gives crypto firms 30 days to register – or face enforcement action](https://decrypt.co/237171/nigeria-sec-crypto-registration-requirement?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).

- [The Biden administration rehires a crypto advisor who is critical of the SEC](https://decrypt.co/236794/biden-admin-rehires-crypto-advisor-critical-sec?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).


### Technology and Development

- [VanEck files for the first Solana ETF to be filed in the US, six days after a similar product filing in Canada](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2024/06/27/vaneck-files-for-solana-etf-sol-rises-6/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).

- [State Street Global Advisors and Galaxy Asset Management said they are working together to build crypto products that offer exposure to crypto companies as well as spot and futures-based ETFs](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2024/06/27/state-street-galaxy-digital-to-develop-active-crypto-trading-products/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).

- [MegaLabs, the main developer firm behind a new “real-time” Ethereum scaling protocol has raised $20 million in a seed round led by Dragonfly Capital](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2024/06/27/megalabs-behind-the-real-time-blockchain-raises-20m-led-by-dragonfly/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).

- [PancakeSwap launches an AI prediction market for Ethereum price movements](https://decrypt.co/news-explorer?pinned=653909&title=pancakeswap-launches-ai-prediction-market-for-ethereum-price-movements&ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).

- [Wormhole will tap Solana-based protocols to verify user’s Worldcoin World IDs that were originally verified on Ethereum](https://decrypt.co/237340/solana-will-get-support-for-worldcoins-world-id?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).


### Ecosystems

- [Galaxy’s new research report states that Ether spot ETFs could see $5B of net inflows in the first five months](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2024/06/27/ether-spot-etfs-could-see-5b-of-net-inflows-in-the-first-five-months-galaxy/?ref=pyth-network.ghost.io).

- [After sweeping Bitcoin and Ethereum liquidations, analysts are watching for accumulation whales](https://decrypt.co/236887/after-sweepi

tags.impact_reason: Pyth Network is a key oracle provider for Solana, and improvements to its data quality and cost-effectiveness directly impact the reliability and efficiency of DeFi and other applications on the blockchain.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic data conduit as the Semantic Anchor because Pyth Network is core financial data infrastructure. The story is about revenue from their data service being used for token buybacks, so I visualized this as a secondary golden pipeline looping back into the main data stream, representing the cyclical flow of value. For the homepage text, I integrated '$1M ARR' as a holographic projection from the conduit itself, as this is the key milestone and financial metric driving the entire narrative.
visual_idea.description: A massive, polished chrome data conduit snakes through a vast, dark server hall. Sections of the conduit are made of translucent glass, revealing a torrent of cyan and magenta data particles flowing within. A smaller, distinct pipeline, glowing with golden light, branches off and loops back into the main structure, symbolizing the revenue buyback. A sleek, integrated holographic display projects from the side of the chrome conduit, showing the diegetic text '$1M ARR'. The background is deep and atmospheric, with the silhouettes of distant server racks creating a sense of immense scale.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, polished chrome data conduit, glistening with ultra-realistic reflections and detailed textures, snakes majestically through a vast, cavernous, and dark server hall. Its immense scale is emphasized by the towering height and expansive negative space above, with the dramatic silhouettes of distant server racks receding into deep, atmospheric shadows. Sections of the conduit are crafted from translucent glass, revealing a breathtaking torrent of luminous cyan and vibrant magenta data particles, flowing with intense volumetric neon light within. A smaller, distinct pipeline, glowing intensely with a warm, cinematic golden light, elegantly branches off and loops back into the main chrome structure, symbolizing revenue buyback. From the side of the polished chrome conduit, a sleek, integrated holographic display projects, manifesting the crisp, diegetic text '$1M ARR' as glowing, ethereal characters, shimmering in the ambient light. The scene is rendered with high dynamic range, deep shadows, and photorealistic, ultra-realistic lighting, creating a dramatic, high-contrast cyber-noir atmosphere with reflective surfaces. 3:4 aspect ratio, 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic data conduit as the Semantic Anchor because Pyth Network is core financial data infrastructure. The story is about revenue from their data service being used for token buybacks, so I visualized this as a secondary golden pipeline looping back into the main data stream, representing the cyclical flow of value. For the homepage text, I integrated '$1M ARR' as a holographic projection from the conduit itself, as this is the key milestone and financial metric driving the entire narrative.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the junction of the Pyth data conduit. We see the glowing golden 'buyback' pipeline merging seamlessly with the main translucent conduit. The camera angle captures the intricate details of the merging light streams—individual golden particles swirling into the larger cyan data flow. The reflective texture of the polished chrome casing and the internal glow of the data are the primary focus, highlighting the sophisticated engineering of the financial mechanism.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot focusing intensely on the junction of the Pyth data conduit, filling the frame with intricate detail. The glowing golden 'buyback' pipeline, rendered with a highly polished chrome casing, merges seamlessly with the main translucent conduit, which pulses with an internal cyan data flow. The camera angle captures the sophisticated engineering, highlighting the intricate details of the merging volumetric neon light streams—individual golden particles swirl with luminous intensity into the larger, ethereal cyan data flow. Reflective textures of the polished chrome casing catch subtle, vibrant neon reflections, emphasizing its high-tech finish. The internal glow of the data is the primary focus, appearing both luminous and substantial within the translucent material. The composition is symmetrical and centrally focused, with an extremely tight macro framing that fills the entire frame with texture and light. This is a highly detailed, futuristic studio render, emphasizing the data oracle aesthetic. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, ultra-sharp focus, shallow depth of field.

editorial.headline: Pyth Activates Token Buybacks as Institutional Data Service Hits $1M ARR
editorial.standfirst: Douro Labs CEO Mike Cahill unveiled the "Pyth Reserve," a mechanism channeling SaaS revenue into open-market token purchases. The move follows the rapid adoption of Pyth Pro, which cracked $1 million in annual recurring revenue within 30 days.
key_takeaways: **Pyth Reserve Live:** New tokenomics direct all DAO revenue to buy PYTH tokens on the open market.
**Rapid Growth:** Pyth Pro hit $1M ARR and 80+ subscribers in its first month, targeting the $50B data market.
**Legacy Disruption:** The network aims to undercut incumbents like **Bloomberg** and **LSEG** with 10x lower costs.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The $50 billion financial data industry—controlled by giants like **Bloomberg**, **LSEG**, and **FactSet**—has long been characterized by opaque pricing and fragmentation. At Breakpoint 2025, **Douro Labs** CEO Mike Cahill positioned **Pyth Network** not merely as a blockchain oracle, but as a direct competitor to these legacy incumbents. Cahill argued that by aggregating data directly from trading firms and exchanges, Pyth can offer institutional-grade feeds at a fraction of the cost, aiming to capture even 1% of this massive market ($500M revenue).

The tip of the spear is **Pyth Pro**, a "Spotify for market data" service launched two months ago. The service has seen immediate product-market fit, generating $1 million in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) within its first month—a benchmark hit by fewer than 5% of SaaS companies in their first year. With pricing ranging from free for developers to $10,000 monthly for enterprises, Pyth has already onboarded over 80 institutional subscribers, validating the demand for high-fidelity, low-latency data outside of traditional walled gardens.

Crucially for investors, this revenue is no longer disconnected from the token. Cahill announced the immediate activation of the **Pyth Reserve**, a systematic value accrual mechanism approved by governance earlier this week. Under this model, all protocol revenue—including Pyth Pro subscriptions, entropy fees, and listing fees—flows into the **Pyth DAO** to purchase PYTH tokens on the open market. These tokens are then sequestered in the reserve, creating a direct link between institutional SaaS adoption and buy pressure on the asset.
